liquidity.warning: Thinly traded — median ~₹0.10 cr/day (< ₹1 cr); signals/exits may slip.

formulas.returns: Trailing point return = price[t] / price[t-N] - 1 (N = 21/63/126/252 trading days); adjusted total-return prices.
formulas.dist_from_52w_high: price[t] / max(price, last 252d) - 1 (how far below the 1-year peak).
formulas.dma: price[t] / mean(price, last N days) - 1; 'above' = price >= the N-day average.
formulas.drawdown: current = price[t]/running-peak - 1; maxDD = min(price/cummax - 1) over the window.
formulas.liquidity: median daily traded value (turnover ÷ 1e7 = ₹ cr) over the last ~21 trading days.
formulas.relative_strength: horizon: stock return - benchmark return (pp); line: (stock/benchmark) rebased to 100 over the last year.

notes.source: adjusted total-return price panel (bhavcopy-reconstructed) + NSE index TR + bhavcopy turnover.
notes.confidence: high where history is long; flagged low if thin/short.
notes.why_useful: what the market is saying about the stock — trend, leadership vs the index/sector, and tradeability.
notes.why_it_can_fail: corporate-action gaps, illiquid names, or a short listing history can distort returns/DMA/RS.

flags.label: Business quality
flags.meaning: Composite of profitability, return on capital, balance-sheet safety and cash conversion (the Fundamentals-tab Quality score).
flags.why_useful: A durable, high-return business compounds value; a low-quality one needs a bigger margin of safety.
flags.why_it_can_fail: A single composite can mask a weak component; open the Fundamentals tab for the breakdown.

flags.label: Cash conversion
flags.read: Only 0.11× — profit not turning into cash (watch receivables/inventory).
flags.meaning: Median of (cash from operations ÷ net profit) over the last 5 years.
flags.why_useful: Profit you can't collect as cash is fragile; >0.8× means earnings are real cash, <0.6× is an accrual red flag.
flags.why_it_can_fail: One-off working-capital swings or a capex year can distort a single ratio; the 5-yr median smooths it.

flags.label: Balance-sheet safety
flags.meaning: Latest debt-to-equity and interest coverage (EBIT ÷ interest) from the balance sheet.
flags.why_useful: Low debt and high interest cover let a business survive a downturn; high debt amplifies trouble.
flags.why_it_can_fail: Off-balance-sheet leases/guarantees aren't captured; a cash-rich firm can show low D/E yet still be risky elsewhere.

flags.label: Earnings momentum
flags.meaning: Trailing-twelve-month net profit vs the year-ago TTM (and whether the YoY rate is rising = 'accelerating').
flags.why_useful: Improving, accelerating earnings tend to drive re-rating; falling profit warns of a deteriorating business.
flags.why_it_can_fail: TTM can be lumpy for cyclicals/one-offs; cross-check the multi-year trend on the Fundamentals tab.

cheapness.read: P/E at the 44-percentile of its 10-yr range — mid-range vs its own history.

valuation.expectations: Trades at 33.9× earnings; multi-year growth not estimable, so 'priced-in' growth is unclear.
valuation.meaning: P/E percentile = where today's price-to-earnings sits within the stock's own last-10-yr range (low = cheap vs its past). Paired with the Quality score and 5-yr profit growth so a cheap multiple is judged against business strength, not in isolation.
valuation.why_useful: Cheapness only matters relative to quality and growth — a low P/E on a declining or peak-cyclical business is a trap, not a bargain.
valuation.why_it_can_fail: P/E breaks for loss-makers / one-offs; for banks use P/B not EV/EBITDA; a multiple cheap vs history can stay cheap if the business has structurally de-rated.

placeholders.label: Promoter pledge (detail)
placeholders.note: share-level pledge history — fetchable via NSE, deferred to MVP-2.

placeholders.label: Bulk / block deals
placeholders.note: large on-market trades — NSE feed, deferred to MVP-2.

placeholders.label: Insider / SAST disclosures
placeholders.note: promoter & designated-person dealings — deferred to MVP-2.

placeholders.label: Exchange announcements
placeholders.note: NSE/BSE filings stream — deferred to MVP-2.

placeholders.label: Results calendar
placeholders.note: next board-meeting / results date — deferred to MVP-2.

ownership.meaning: Quarterly shareholding (% held by Promoters / Foreign (FII) / Domestic (DII) institutions / Public) from Screener, plus exchange corporate actions tagged by materiality (High = structural: bonus/split/buyback/merger; Low = routine: dividend/AGM).
ownership.why_useful: Rising promoter & institutional ownership and clean corporate actions are confirming signals; falling promoter stake or pledging is a governance/skin-in-the-game warning.
ownership.why_it_can_fail: Shareholding is a lagged quarterly snapshot; promoter % can fall for benign reasons (QIP, ESOP dilution). Pledge & insider detail are deferred (placeholders below).

top_positives: Outpacing the NIFTY 500 by +108pp over 12 months.
key_risks: Only 0.11× — profit not turning into cash (watch receivables/inventory).
monitor_next: Next quarterly results (board-meeting date is an MVP-2 placeholder).
Re-rating toward / away from its median P/E (35.0×).
Relative-strength inflection vs its sector index.
Promoter pledge / institutional-holding changes next quarter.
caveats: Thinly traded — median ~₹0.10 cr/day (< ₹1 cr); signals/exits may slip.
corporate-action gaps, illiquid names, or a short listing history can distort returns/DMA/RS.
snapshot.disclaimer: Diagnostics only — a structured reading of price behaviour, business fundamentals, valuation and ownership for your OWN judgement. This is NOT a buy/sell/hold recommendation.
snapshot.method: Each dimension is a transparent rule-based tally of the flags above (positive ≥ +2, negative ≤ -2 for Market/Business/Valuation; ±1 for Ownership). 'Positive' valuation means the multiple looks supportive vs the stock's own history — not a call to buy.

data_quality.liquidity_warning: Thinly traded — median ~₹0.10 cr/day (< ₹1 cr); signals/exits may slip.
data_quality.note: Market data is daily and current; fundamentals & shareholding are as of the last cached Screener fetch (quarterly/annual). Confidence is lower for thin or short-history names.
